Name: FREDERICK ARIAS
Description: Unlawful Flight to Avoid Prosecution - Conspiracy; Fraudulent Schemes and Artifices; Money Laundering in the First Degree; Theft (10 Counts); Illegal Control of an Enterprise (Two Counts); Forgery; Fraudulent Schemes and Practices; Failure to Appear
RewardText: The FBI is offering a reward of up to $25,000 for information leading to the arrest and conviction of Frederick Arias.
